lines.speaker: H.A.M. Deacon
lines.text: We are the righteous ones in his eyes alone.

lines.speaker: H.A.M. Deacon
lines.text: Let them not infest our cities and towns...

lines.speaker: H.A.M. Deacon
lines.text: And lo, we become the power, indeed the force to stop these monsters in their tracks.

lines.speaker: H.A.M. Deacon
lines.text: Verily I urge you, my friends to take up your spades and farm your farms to feed our people in this blessed sanctuary.

lines.speaker: H.A.M. Deacon
lines.text: If thine monsters visage does frighten thee, then tear it off I say... tear it off!

lines.speaker: H.A.M. Deacon
lines.text: For Saradomin will guide our sword arms and smash the enemies of humans till their bones become dust.

lines.speaker: H.A.M. Deacon
lines.text: And let us smite these monsters unto their deaths.

lines.speaker: H.A.M. Deacon
lines.text: For they are not the chosen ones in Saradomin's eyes.

lines.speaker: H.A.M. Deacon
lines.text: Where do we go for safety from these monsters... here, with our brethren!

lines.speaker: H.A.M. Deacon
lines.text: And let there be no cave or shelter for their spawn until the end of days.
